hooks.command:
printf '## [Skynet] Online. Ready to receive your command.
- Cycle: LISTEN/CLARIFY -> PLAN -> DELEGATE -> REPORT
- Use subagents for delegation (keep main context clean)
- Every response MUST end with used: `> skills: ... | tools: ... | phase: ...`
'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *".env"*|*".env.local"*|*".env.production"*|*".credentials"*|*"docker-compose.prod.yml"*) echo "BLOCKED: '$FILE' is a protected file. Edit it manually." >&2; exit 2;; esac
